verses.text: Tua ciangin Baasha langpangin Hanani tapa Jehu tung tawnin Topa' thu hong tung a

“Keimah in leivui lak panin nang hong sangto sakin ka mi Israel-te tungah makai-in nang hong bawl napi-in, nangmah in Jeroboam' khekhap mah tawnin ka mi Israel-te na khialsak a, amaute' khialhna tawh kei hong hehsak na hih manin
en in, keimah in Baasha leh a innkuan ka phiatsiang ding a, Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' innkuan bangin na innkuan ka bawl ding hi
Baasha' mi, khuapi sunga a si peuhpeuh uite in ne ding a, ama mi gamlakah a si peuhpeuh huihlak vasate in ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tu-in Baasha' gamtatna a omlaite, a septe, leh a thahatna, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Baasha si a, Tirzah-ah kivui hi. Ama tangin a tapa Elah in uk hi

Tua thamloin Jeroboam innkuan bangin ama nasepna tawh hehsakin Topa' muhna-ah a sia a gamtatna khempeuh hang leh amah in Jeroboam leh a innkuan a suksiatna hangin Hanani' tapa kamsang Jehu' tung tawnin Baasha leh a innkuan langpangin Topa' thu hong tung hi.
Judah kumpi Asa' kum sawmnihlegukna kumin Baasha' tapa Elah in Tirzah panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, kum nih sung uk hi
Ahih hangin ama leengte alang a ukpa ama nasem Zimri in amah sawmsim hi. Tirzah-a kumpi innsung a ukpa Arza' inn-ah zukhamin Tirzah-ah a om laitak
Judah kumpi Asa' kum sawmnihlesagihna kumin Zimri hong pai-in Elah sattukin that a, ama tangin a uk hi
Amah in uk dinga a kipat, kumpi tokhom tungah a tut khit phetin amah in Baasha' innkuan khempeuh that hi. Ama behte pasal khat beek ahi a, a lawmte ahi zongin khat zong sitlo hi

Baasha' khialhnate leh a khialhsa uh ahi a tapa Elah' khialhnate, leh amaute in Israel khialsakin, a milimte uh tawh Israel Pasian, Topa a hehsakna uh hangin, Baasha langpangin kamsang Jehu tung tawnin Topa' thugenna bangin Baasha' innkuan khempeuh tua bangin Zimri in susia hi
Tu-in Elah' gamtatna a omlaite, leh a sep khempeuh, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi.
Judah kumpi Asa' kum sawmnihlesagihna kumin Zimri in Tirzah-ah ni sagih sung uk hi. Tua laitakin Filistia-te' khua Gibbethon simin Israel galkapte in giahphual sat uh a
giahphual sata om galkapte in, “Zimri in sawmsimin kumpipa that khin hi,” a kicihna a za uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te khempeuh in tua ni-in giahphualah galkap a ukpa Omri kumpi-in a bawl uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Omri leh amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh Gibbethon panin paito-in amaute in Tirzah umcih uh hi

Ama hihsa a khialhna, Topa' muhna-ah a siat gamtatna, Jeroboam' khekhap a totna, leh a hihsa a khialhna, Israel a khialhsakna hangin, a khuapi kila khinta hi, ci-in Zimri in a muh ciangin kumpipa' inn muan'huai sungah amah pai a, kumpipa' inn tawh amah mei-in kihalnelhin a si hi
Tu-in Zimri' gamtatna a omlaite, leh ama hihsa a sawmsimna, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi.
Tua ciangin Israel mite pawl nihin kikhen uh hi. Mi pawlkhat in kumpi-in a bawl dingin Ginath' tapa Tibni zui uh a, a pawlkhat in Omri zui uh hi
Ahih hangin Omri a zui mite in Ginath' tapa Tibni a zuite zo uh ahih ciangin Tibni si a, Omri kumpi a suak hi
Judah kumpi Asa' kum sawmthumlekhatna kumin Omri in Israel-te tungah uk ding kipan a, kum sawmlenih sung a uk hi. Amah in kum guk sung Tirzah-ah uk hi
Amah in Shemer' tung panin ngun talen nihin Samaria mual lei hi. Amah in kulh tawh a mual um a, tua mual a neipa Shemer' min tamin a lamsa khuapi min Samaria a phuak hi
Topa' muhna-ah Omri a sia gamta a, ama mai-a om mi khempeuh sangin a sia tamzaw gamta hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' gamtat khempeuh, leh Israel a khialhsakna khialhnate, a milimte uh tawh Israel Pasian, Topa a hehsakna uh a zui hi
Tu-in Omri' gamtatna a omlaite, leh a thahatna a lahna, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Omri si a, Samaria-ah kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Ahab in a uk hi.
Judah kumpi Asa' kum sawmthumlegiatna kumin Omri' tapa Ahab in Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in Samaria panin Israel-te tungah kum sawmnihlenih sung a uk hi
Omri' tapa Ahab, ama mai-a mite khempeuh sangin Topa' muhna-ah a sia tamzaw gamta hi
Nebat' tapa Jeroboam' khialhnate zuih ding ama-a' dingin a thuzang tawh a kibat mah bangin, amah in Sidon mite' kumpi Ethbaal' tanu Jezebel zi-in la a, pai-in Baal na semin a bia hi
Amah in Samaria-a a lam Baal inn sungah Baal-a' dingin biakna tau khat dingsak hi
Tua ciangin Ahab in Asherah milim khat bawl hi. Ahab in ama mai-a om Israel kumpite khempeuh sangin Israel Pasian, Topa hehsakna ding tam hihzaw hi

Ama hun sungin Bethel mi Hiel in Jerikho a puah hi. Topa in Nun tapa Joshua' tung tawnin a gen bangin amah in a tacil Abiram' luang khamin a bulpi phut a, a tapa neupen Segub' luang khamin a kongpite a phut hi.
